ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "day_date" TEXT /* The day of the month */,
  "full_date" TEXT /* Full date in a formatted string */,
  "day_number" INTEGER /* The day number of the month */,
  "day_name" TEXT /* The name of the day */,
  "day_name_short" TEXT /* Short name of the day */,
  "is_week_day" INTEGER /* Indicates if the day is a weekday */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* The week number of the year */,
  "month_number" INTEGER /* The month number */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* The name of the month */,
  "month_name_short" TEXT /* Short name of the month */,
  "quarter_number" INTEGER /* The quarter number of the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year */,
  "is_public_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the day is a public holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the public holiday (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the date the event is scheduled */,
  "event_title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "event_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location where the event will take place */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer */,
  "recurring_type" TEXT /* Type of recurrence (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "recursion_end_date" TEXT /* End date for recursive events */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the organizer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organizer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the organizer belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_off" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time-off request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee requesting time off */,
  "start_date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the start date of the time off */,
  "end_date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the end date of the time off */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "type_of_leave" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., vacation, sick, family emergency) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the time off (if provided) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_off_end_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_off_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_off_start_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee attending the event */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., attended, absent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
